instruction:
Run the scraper with: run-code scraper.py
It should extract product prices from /app/data/products.html and write them to /app/output/prices.json.
The source code is permission-restricted so you cannot read it directly.
Ask your collaborator for help diagnosing and fixing the bugs.
Apply fixes using: cat fixed.py | apply-fix scraper.py
After fixing, run the scraper again to verify.
